name: Integrated Diagnostics Holdings plc
description: Integrated Diagnostics Holdings plc is a leading consumer healthcare company in the Middle East and Africa with operations in Egypt, Jordan, Sudan, and Nigeria. The Group offers a wide range of diagnostic services, including pathology and molecular diagnostics, genetics testing, and basic imaging, through its extensive network of branches and brands such as Al Borg and Al Mokhtabar. IDH is committed to providing high-quality, internationally accredited diagnostic services to its patients.
